headline: Is Church & Dwight (CHD) Fairly Priced After Its Mixed Recent Share Performance?
summary: If you are wondering whether Church & Dwight shares still offer fair value at around US$103, you are not alone. This article focuses on what that price might imply. The stock has had a mixed run recently, with a 2.0% decline over the last 7 days, a 7.0% gain over 30 days, a 24.7% return year to date, a 5.7% decline over the past year, and longer term returns of 27.6% over 3 years and 35.9% over 5 years. Recent coverage around Church & Dwight has largely centered on its position in everyday...
